dict.source: In this theme, you can use ==~~your words~~==, *==~~your words~~==* and *~~your words~~* to obtain a cloze-style, active this option to cancel it
dict.target: 在此主题中，您可以使用 ==~~您的文字~~==、*==~~您的文字~~==* 和 *~~您的文字~~* 来获得脱落样式。启用此选项可取消它。

dict.source: Cloze Style One, i.e. ==~~your words~~==, hovering to find "your words", should declare "cssclass：cloze" in the YAML area if you want to use them in the Live Preview mode
dict.target: 样式一，即 ==~~您的文字~~==，悬停查看“您的文字”。若要在实时预览模式下使用，请在 YAML 区域声明 "cssclass：cloze"。

dict.source: Can type 'solid', 'dotted', 'dashed', 'wavy' or 'double' for Cloze Style One, i.e. ==~~your words~~==, hovering to find "your words", should declare "cssclass：cloze" in the YAML area if you want to use them in the Live Preview mode
dict.target: 对于第一类 Cloze 样式（即 ==~~your words~~==），悬停查看“your words”。若要在实时预览模式下使用，请在 YAML 区域声明 'cssclass：cloze'。可输入 'solid', 'dotted', 'dashed', 'wavy' 或 'double'。

dict.source: For Cloze Style One, i.e. ==~~your words~~==, hovering to find "your words", should declare 'cssclass：cloze' in the YAML area if you want to use them in the Live Preview mode
dict.target: 对于第一类 Cloze 样式（即 ==~~your words~~==），悬停查看“your words”。若要在实时预览模式下使用，请在 YAML 区域声明 'cssclass：cloze'。

dict.source: Underline decoration style for Cloze style TWO
dict.target: 第二类 Cloze 样式的下划线装饰样式

dict.source: Can type 'solid', 'dotted', 'dashed', 'wavy', 'double' or 'none' for Cloze Style TWO, i.e. *==~~your words~~==*, pressing down the primary mouse button to find "your words", should declare 'cssclass：cloze' in the YAML area if you want to use them in the Live Preview mode
dict.target: 对于第二类 Cloze 样式（即 *==~~your words~~==*），按住鼠标左键查看“your words”。若要在实时预览模式下使用，请在 YAML 区域声明 'cssclass：cloze'。可输入 'solid', 'dotted', 'dashed', 'wavy', 'double' 或 'none'。

dict.target: 对于第二类 Cloze 样式（即 *==~~your words~~==*），按住鼠标左键查看“your words”。若要在实时预览模式下使用，请在 YAML 区域声明 'cssclass：cloze'。

dict.target: 对于第三类 Cloze 样式（即 *~~your words~~*），按住鼠标左键查看“your words”。若要在实时预览模式下使用，请在 YAML 区域声明 'cssclass：cloze'。可输入 'solid', 'dotted', 'dashed', 'wavy', 'double' 或 'none'。

启用可点击图标的悬停动画

dict.source: You can add 🔸|Left (can also use `left`, `LEFT` or `L` to replace the `Left` before), 🔸|Right (right/RIGHT/R) and 🔸|Inline (inline/INLINE/inl/INL/Inl) 🔸|Centre/Center (CENTRE/CENTER/centre/center/C) (the “centre” one is for the “Obsidian Default Image Position above only, because Topaz's default image position is in the centre) into a image format to adjust the image position, e.g. ![[*.jpg|L]], ![[*.png|Right|200]] and ![|inl](...*.jpg)
dict.target: 你可以在图片格式中添加 🔸|Left（也可用 `left`, `LEFT` 或 `L` 代替），🔸|Right（right/RIGHT/R）和 🔸|Inline（inline/INLINE/inl/INL/Inl）🔸|Centre/Center（CENTRE/CENTER/centre/center/C）（“centre”选项仅适用于“Obsidian 默认图片位置”上方，因为 Topaz 的默认图片位置在中间）来调整图片位置，例如 ![[*.jpg|L]], ![[*.png|Right|200]] 和 ![|inl](...*.jpg)

dict.source: You can add 🔸#Left|your captions (can also use `left`, `LEFT` or `L` to replace the `Left`), 🔸#Right (or right/RIGHT/R)|your captions, 🔸#center/centre (CENTRE/CENTER/Center/Centre/C) |your captions and 🔸#inl (Inline/INLINE/inline/INL/Inl) |your captions into a image format to adjust the image position with a image caption, e.g. ![[*.jpg#left|Figure 1]], ![[*.png#right|Figure 2|200]], ![[*.jpg#centre|Figure 3]] and ![[*.jpg#inl|Figure 4|100]]
dict.target: 你可以在图片格式中添加 🔸#Left|你的标题（也可用 `left`, `LEFT` 或 `L` 代替），🔸#Right（或 right/RIGHT/R）|你的标题，🔸#center/centre（CENTRE/CENTER/Center/Centre/C）|你的标题和 🔸#inl（Inline/INLINE/inline/INL/Inl）|你的标题来调整图片位置并添加标题，例如 ![[*.jpg#left|Figure 1]], ![[*.png#right|Figure 2|200]], ![[*.jpg#centre|Figure 3]] 和 ![[*.jpg#inl|Figure 4|100]]

dict.source: You can add 🔸|+grid into some images to grid these images in a line, e.g. ![[*.jpg|+grid]] Or type ❗cssclass：img-grid❗ in YAML to make images arrange in a grid in the preview mode. require Contextual Typography plugin
dict.target: 你可以在某些图片中添加 🔸|+grid 来将图片排成一行，例如 ![[*.jpg|+grid]] 或者在 YAML 中输入 ❗cssclass：img-grid❗ 以在预览模式下让图片排列成网格。需要 Contextual Typography 插件

dict.source: There are some built-in CSS classes that should be manually declared in the YAML area. Details refer to the TIPS demo vault for Blue Topaz on Github.
dict.target: 有一些内置 CSS 类需要在 YAML 区域手动声明。详情请参考 Github 上 Blue Topaz 的 TIPS 演示库。

dict.source: ❗cssclass：kanban❗ A kind of kanban-liked style for unordered lists. (Adapted from Spectrum theme by @Wiktoria Mielcarek)
dict.target: ❗cssclass：kanban❗ 一种类似看板的无序列表样式。（改编自 @Wiktoria Mielcarek 的 Spectrum 主题）
模糊半径（用于毛玻璃风格）

dict.source: ❗cssclass：code-wrap❗ Can be used to wrap code in code blocks for individual .md file
dict.target: ❗cssclass：code-wrap❗ 可用于在单个 .md 文件中将代码包裹在代码块中

dict.source: List in a horizontal row (inline list)
dict.target: 水平排列列表（内联列表）

dict.source: ❗cssclass：inline-list❗ To make the list show in a horizontal row. Meanwhile, it makes the list show inline which can be used with inline images (like ![[xxx.jpg|inlineR]])
dict.target: ❗cssclass：inline-list❗ 使列表水平显示。同时，它使列表内联显示，可与内联图片一起使用（如 ![[xxx.jpg|inlineR]]）

dict.source: ❗cssclass：img-grid❗ To make images arrange in a grid in the preview mode. (adapted from https://github.com/iEchoxu/obsidian_orange/blob/main/.obsidian/snippets/image-grid.css)
dict.target: ❗cssclass：img-grid❗ 使图片在预览模式下呈网格排列。 (改编自 https://github.com/iEchoxu/obsidian_orange/blob/main/.obsidian/snippets/image-grid.css)

dict.source: ❗cssclass：matrix❗ Usage https://forum.obsidian.md/t/theme-spectrum-version-1-0-0-and-resise-graphs-controls/12688/34 (Adapted from Spectrum theme by @Wiktoria Mielcarek)
dict.target: ❗cssclass：matrix❗ 用法 https://forum.obsidian.md/t/theme-spectrum-version-1-0-0-and-resise-graphs-controls/12688/34 (改编自 @Wiktoria Mielcarek 的 Spectrum 主题)

dict.source: ❗cssclass：fullwidth  wide-dataview wide-table wide-callout  wide-backlinks❗ (Adapted from https://github.com/efemkay @ Faiz Khuzaimah)
dict.target: ❗cssclass：fullwidth  wide-dataview wide-table wide-callout  wide-backlinks❗ (改编自 https://github.com/efemkay @ Faiz Khuzaimah)
